exercises.title: Network Audit
exercises.description:
Map your current professional network:
1. List 10 people you know professionally
2. Rate your closeness (1-10)
3. When did you last connect?
4. Identify 3 gaps (people/industries you're missing)
hints: Think about who you could help AND who could help you

solution.code:
Network map:
Name | Industry | Closeness (1-10) | Last Contact | Can Help With
___  | ___      | ___               | ___          | ___
...

Analysis:
- Strong connections (7-10): ___
- Medium connections (4-6): ___
- Weak connections (1-3): ___

Gaps to fill:
1. Industry/area I'm missing: ___
2. Seniority level I don't know: ___
3. Perspective I lack: ___

exercises.title: Elevator Pitch
exercises.description:
Write and practice a 30-second elevator pitch:
1. Who you are
2. What you do
3. What you're looking for or passionate about
Practice it out loud until it sounds natural, not rehearsed.
hints: Focus on value you bring, not just job title

solution.code:
Template:
'Hi, I'm [Name]. I [what you do] at [company/context]. I'm passionate about [what drives you]. Right now, I'm focused on [current project/goal]. I'd love to learn more about [what the other person does].'

Example:
'Hi, I'm Priya. I'm a UX designer who helps startups create intuitive mobile apps. I'm passionate about making technology accessible to everyone. Right now, I'm working on a health app for elderly users. I'd love to hear about what you're building.'

Practice 5 times in front of a mirror. Time it: should be 25-35 seconds.

exercises.title: Networking Challenge
exercises.description:
This week:
1. Attend one networking event (virtual or in-person)
2. Have 3 meaningful conversations (not just 'what do you do?')
3. Connect with all 3 within 24 hours with personalized messages
4. Follow up with one existing contact you haven't spoken to in months
hints: Listen more than you talk (80/20 rule)

solution.code:
After the event:
Person 1: Name ___ | What we discussed ___ | Follow-up message sent? ___
Person 2: Name ___ | What we discussed ___ | Follow-up message sent? ___
Person 3: Name ___ | What we discussed ___ | Follow-up message sent? ___

Existing contact reconnected:
Name ___ | What we discussed ___ | Next step ___

Reflection:
- What went well? ___
- What was hardest? ___
- What will I do differently next time? ___
